questionHtml: BLASTp was used to obtain the alignment of the genes coding for PSY. Outline reasons for BLASTn not being suitable for obtaining this alignment.
markschemeHtml:
a. BLASTp aligns amino acids «of proteins» ✔

b. BLASTn aligns nucleotides «of DNA/RNA» ✔

c. amino acid sequence is shown therefore BLASTn would not work ✔
